basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: G.B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. ZBC with basic knowledge of computer and minimum 1 year experience in relevant field.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: B.Sc. ZBC with basic knowledge of computer and minimum 1 year experience in relevant field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the GBPUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download GBPUAT Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: B.Sc. ZBC with basic knowledge of computer and minimum 1 year experience in relevant field.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in ZBC (Zoology, Botany, Chemistry) along with basic computer knowledge and at least one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant role at GBPUAT?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the Principal Investigator's departmental address. Specific email details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview scheduled for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The interview for the Project Assistant position is scheduled to be held on 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based position, meaning the employment is linked to the duration and funding of the specific research project.

faq.question: Q9. Does GBPUAT offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation is not explicitly provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You will need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.
